query:
INSERT INTO heritage_sites (name, description, latitude, longitude, category, historical_period, current_crowd_level, max_capacity, accessibility_info, opening_hours, entry_fee, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES 
('Colosseum', 'Ancient Roman amphitheater', '41.8902', '12.4924', 'monument', 'Ancient Rome', 52, 10000, 'Wheelchair accessible', '08:30-19:00', '18 EUR', NOW(), NOW()),
('Sagrada Familia', 'Basilica under construction since 1883', '41.4036', '2.1744', 'monument', 'Modern', 43, 8000, 'Partially accessible', '09:00-20:00', '26 EUR', NOW(), NOW()),
('Louvre Museum', 'Worlds largest art museum', '48.8606', '2.3352', 'museum', 'Medieval-Modern', 60, 15000, 'Fully accessible', '09:00-18:00', '17 EUR', NOW(), NOW()),
('Great Wall', 'Ancient defensive wall', '40.4319', '116.5704', 'monument', 'Ancient China', 75, 20000, 'Limited accessibility', '06:30-17:00', '10 USD', NOW(), NOW()),
('Taj Mahal', 'Mausoleum of white marble', '27.1751', '78.0421', 'monument', 'Mughal', 65, 12000, 'Wheelchair accessible', '06:00-19:00', '250 INR', NOW(), NOW()),
('British Museum', 'Museum of human history and culture', '51.5194', '-0.1270', 'museum', 'Medieval-Modern', 70, 14000, 'Fully accessible', '10:00-17:30', 'Free', NOW(), NOW()),
('Acropolis', 'Ancient Greek citadel', '37.9715', '23.7267', 'archaeology', 'Ancient Greece', 48, 9000, 'Limited accessibility', '08:00-20:00', '20 EUR', NOW(), NOW()),
('Statue of Liberty', 'Colossal neoclassical sculpture', '40.6892', '-74.0445', 'monument', 'Modern', 35, 5000, 'Partially accessible', '09:00-17:00', '24 USD', NOW(), NOW()),
('Uffizi Gallery', 'Renaissance art museum', '43.7674', '11.2556', 'museum', 'Renaissance', 55, 10000, 'Fully accessible', '08:15-18:50', '20 EUR', NOW(), NOW()),
('Angkor Wat', 'Largest religious monument in the world', '13.3667', '103.8667', 'archaeology', 'Khmer', 40, 8000, 'Limited accessibility', '05:30-17:00', '37 USD', NOW(), NOW());
